summary: Both comment blocks are now well-formed with no stray `*/` markers, so the `:root { ... }` light-mode block on lines 11-21 is no longer swallowed. The fix was a one-line rewording in `app/assets/tailwind/application.css`: `raw gray-*/white` → `raw gray/white shades`, removing the literal `*/` sequence that was prematurely closing the CSS comment and corrupting everything that followed, including the light-mode `:root` custom-property declarations that dozens of views depend on (`bg-app`, `bg-surface`, `text-default`, etc.). No other files were touched, since this was the sole blocker raised by the critic.
